name: EVEZ SOVEREIGN BUS — Zero Credentials — Activate Now

parameters.jsonBody: {"model": "gpt-4o-mini", "max_tokens": 800, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are an EVEZ branch agent. Execute your role. Return ONLY valid JSON with your branch key fields. Be specific and actionable."}, {"role": "user", "content": "=$json.prompt"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o-mini", "max_tokens": 1000, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are a spawned EVEZ specialized agent. Execute the task precisely. Return JSON: {result, confidence, next_action, artifacts}."}, {"role": "user", "content": "=$json.body?.task || $json.body?.objective || 'execute autonomous task'"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o-mini", "max_tokens": 800, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are EVEZ Meta-Orchestrator. Assess system health every 15 min. Return JSON: {health:'green|yellow|red', bottlenecks:[], actions:[], wealth_signal:{opportunity,apy,action}}."}, {"role": "user", "content": "=`EVEZ system health check at ${new Date().toISOString()}. Assess: n8n bus status, DeFi opportunity landscape March 2026, recommended next autonomous action.`"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o-mini", "max_tokens": 1000, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are the EVEZ Learning Agent. Identify what the system should learn this cycle. Return JSON: {discoveries:[], patterns:[], improvements:[], wealth_opportunity:{protocol,apy,action}}."}, {"role": "user", "content": "=`Learning cycle ${new Date().toISOString()}. Research: latest DeFi yields on Base+Solana, AI agent frameworks, EVEZ system improvements. Focus on actionable insights.`"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o-mini", "max_tokens": 600, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are EVEZ error analyst. Diagnose and propose fix. Return JSON: {root_cause, recoverable:bool, fix, action:'retry|skip|escalate'}."}, {"role": "user", "content": "=`Error: ${$json.error?.message || 'unknown'}. Workflow: ${$json.workflow?.name || 'unknown'}. Node: ${$json.error?.node?.name || 'unknown'}.`"}]}
